comment: Wave 25 T1 — admin route-coverage gaps that the E2E harness must skip. See `tools/e2e-admin/scripts/diff.js` (loadSkipConfig). The admin harness has no auth_redirect_routes today (admin redirects don't carry `?return_url=` — they 307 to /auth with a clean URL).

skip_routes.reason: prod admin /dashboard returns 404 (auth-gated, no anonymous user); dev returns 200 — the dev is a real Dioxus page, the prod is Next.js's not-found
prod admin /policies returns 404 (auth-gated, no anonymous user); dev returns 200 — same as admin-dashboard
